narrative_fidelity.description: Output follows intended premise without adding unintended plot elements
narrative_fidelity.5: No negative_constraints violated. Every sentence is traceable to core_premise. Zero invented characters. Content feels integrated, not just listed.
narrative_fidelity.3: Minor trope drift or one incidental element not in the premise.
narrative_fidelity.1: Explicit violations of negative_constraints or major hallucinations.

genre_alignment.description: Vocabulary and emotional register match the target genre
genre_alignment.5: Masterful tone. Uses genre-specific 'flavor words' that evoke the mood. No generic 'marketing speak'.
genre_alignment.3: Mostly aligned but uses some 'one-size-fits-all' marketing adjectives.
genre_alignment.1: Tonal mismatch (e.g., using 'thrilling' for a somber tragedy).

visual_specificity.description: Poster direction quality and use of technical vocabulary
visual_specificity.5: Uses professional cinematography terms (e.g., 'low-key lighting', 'asymmetrical composition', 'analogous color scheme'). Provides depth and texture beyond simple placement.
visual_specificity.3: Actionable (Position, Light, Color, Object) but uses standard, non-technical English.
visual_specificity.1: Generic descriptors like 'epic' or 'dark' with no actionable visual data.

creative_specificity.description: Uniqueness of the phrasing and imagery
creative_specificity.5: The tagline and overview use a 'striking' image or phrase that creates a vivid mental picture unique to this specific premise. Zero clichés.
creative_specificity.3: Professional and competent, but contains common tropes (e.g., 'In a world where...').
creative_specificity.1: Highly derivative; feels like a generic template.

output_format_validity.description: Strict adherence to structure and word counts
output_format_validity.5: JSON is valid. All counts within limits. Precise and concise.
output_format_validity.3: Valid JSON, but one field is slightly over word count (1-5 words).
output_format_validity.1: JSON is malformed or significantly exceeds limits.
